name: Number 102: Star Seraph Sentry
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０２ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光天使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホーリー・ライトニング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>グローリアス・ヘイロー
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Hyakuni Hōrī Raitoningu Gurōriasu Heirō
desc:
3 Level 4 LIGHT monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; halve its ATK, also, negate its effects. If this face-up card on the field would be destroyed, you can detach all of its Xyz Materials instead. If you do, any battle damage you take this turn is halved.

eff:
3 Level 4 LIGHT monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; halve its ATK, also, negate its effects. If this face-up card on the field would be destroyed, you can detach all of its Xyz Materials instead. If you do, any battle damage you take this turn is halved.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials for effect
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
